title: SubtleCraft
description: Enhancing Minecraft's iconic style with intricate textures, this innovative pack enriches the game's visual experience without altering its core design.
body:
# SubtleCraft


> This texture pack introduces modern, detailed textures that seamlessly integrate with Minecraft's classic aesthetic, preserving its nostalgic charm while delivering a fresh and visually engaging experience for both veteran and new players"The texture pack is currently in beta, and only the textures for blocks and items have been updated so far. Everything else remains unchanged."These screenshots were taken using the Complementary Shaders - Unbound shader.These textures were created using Adobe Photoshop 2025.
